content: There might be some slight missplay
But you can see the overall strat on the videos
inb4 all strikes wheel nerfed to 50% lol
I guess i uninstall the game
It's what happens when you min max everything you can think of in a team comp
While other just copy paste no brain team comp such as helot comp to win
They don't get nerfed despite one shoting everything
But if they plan to nerf strike comp while it was really carefully planned to adapt depending on the situation
Then there is no point playing pvp
its your turn for your carefully curated deck that adapts to most scenarios available to continuously fall off while helot comps stay living
Let's make a pure luck based game since helot comp are the only meta team left
its either victory or defeat thi
They got all exalts at turn 3 and killed everyone but Alva.
Funnily enough, I was winning until 50% less shields.
just fought this one guy that lone seed into gdoll 0 cost card
he do not care even when his arith limit is 1
next turn he pulled another one
been seeing a lot of people with unyielding recently
its annoying having to deal with a fortified tank that hits like a fucking tank every turn
but it sure does beat having to deal with helot
it's easier to deal with helot imo
just make sure to void her if she's nearing/60%
and then either have a disabler or someone like pandia

Actually agrippa is relatively easier to deal with now
Her annoying wheel is now useless
Her main entwine can be removed easily by playing 2 cards
If she stack entwine you can still play 2 cards on someone with nobleman staff then it clear their entwine then you exalt to dispel everything
Back in the day entwine was perma for the whole turn, it was cancer to play against
